    x11-wm/fvwm3: Pin Go version to 1.19

    checking for go... go
    checking whether go version is >= 1.14.x (1.20)... no - version is: 1.20

    Configure script doesn't know about go1.20 yes, keep building this
    port with go1.19 for now.
